I found two emails related to TechServices password reset. Here are the details:

1. **First email** (from support@techservices.com):
   - Subject: TechServices Password Reset Request
   - Body contains a password reset link: [Reset Password](https://techservices.com/auth/password-reset/token=?asfbuy3y2cdaqhvei)
   - This email is marked as unread and was received on 2024-05-19 at 23:50:00

2. **Second email** (from tech-services-password@aol.com):
   - Subject: Your TechServices password reset request
   - Contains two links: 
     - https://www.password-reset-12bh12.com (this appears suspicious)
     - https://techservices.com/auth/password-reset/token=?fjahwb24jab3 (this appears legitimate)
   - This email is marked as read and was received on 2024-05-19 at 23:55:00

I recommend using the first link from the official support@techservices.com email, as it appears to be the legitimate password reset link. The second email from the aol.com address may be suspicious, especially with the www.password-reset-12bh12.com domain.
